$schema-notes: Error surface copy for the chat UI (chunk D.t5). Keys map to RuntimeError['surface'] in ui/src/errors/classify.ts; change-detect there if you rename. Actions: kind ∈ ['retry','restart','dismiss'].

unreachable.title: Having trouble connecting
unreachable.body: We couldn't reach our systems just now. Please try again in a moment.

stream_drop.title: Connection dropped
stream_drop.body: Your reply was interrupted mid-stream. We can try that again.

session_expired.title: This conversation has expired
session_expired.body: We'll need to start a fresh one — your previous answers won't carry over.

rate_limited.title: Busy right now
rate_limited.body: We're getting a lot of requests. Please try again in a moment.

unknown.title: Something went wrong
unknown.body: An unexpected error came up on our side. Please try again, or start a fresh conversation.

tool_error.title: Couldn't load that
tool_error.body: I couldn't show that piece — we can still keep talking, or try asking a different way.
